evals.name: basic-build
evals.expected_output: 查找 Maven 路径，验证后执行 clean install 命令

evals.name: multi-args
evals.prompt: 帮我执行 mvn clean install -DskipTests
evals.expected_output: 正确传递多个参数，执行 clean install 并跳过测试

evals.name: implicit-trigger
evals.prompt: 编译这个 Java 项目
evals.expected_output: 识别为 Maven 构建需求，触发 skill 执行 mvn compile

evals.name: dependency-query
evals.expected_output: 触发 skill 执行 dependency:tree

evals.name: module-build
evals.prompt: 只构建 common 模块及其依赖
evals.expected_output: 执行 mvn clean install -pl common -am
